versions.changelog:
## [0.2.0] - 2026-03-29

### 🚀 Features

- *(search)* Add tmdb-first discovery and async stream hydration

### 🐛 Bug Fixes

- *(build)* Add missing tmdb logging import

## [0.1.1] - 2026-03-27

### 🐛 Bug Fixes

- *(ci)* Use release token for gh-pages publish

### 🎨 Styling

- Fix Common.cs indentation for dotnet format

## [0.1.0] - 2026-03-27

### 🚀 Features

- Add search images
- Add task
- Add task
- Add support for remote subtitles
- Add purge function
- Add purge function
- Allow deletion of individual stremio items
- Add download support
- Add download support

- Support tags
- Use tmp dirs for gelato paths as default
- Support for opensubtitles plugin
- Support for opensubtitles plugin
- Load episodes from meta provider instead of catalog by default
- Add DISABLE_P2P env
- Mark episode dto virtual if unaired
- Local search

- Dont cache if no streams

- Migrate Palco caching services to Gelato (#102)
- Use import task from plugin ui for feedback
- Add support for segment providers and add introdb provider (#110)
- Implement subtitle provider integration including an gelato subtitle provider (#112)
- Move user configs to own tab
- Prewarm subtitles
- Base catalog import progress on the catalog items
- Add settings item to main menu (#116)
- Add js injector and local-search-toggle (#139)
- Make js injection false by default
